title: setaria intermedia
intro: Setaria intermedia, also known as green foxtail or yellow foxtail, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues. Setaria intermedia can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
